items.label: Overview
items.content: ZYNQ.games is a game registry API with filtering, sorting, favorites, history and random selection. It exposes a live dataset via .list and metadata like .total and .filteredCount.

items.label: Methods
items.content:
Search & filter
- .search(query)
- .reset()
- .getByCategory(category)
- .filterSupported()

Sorting
- .sortBy(field)
- .sortByPopularity()

Access
- .getByAlias(alias)
- .getRandomOne()
- .random(n)
- .shuffle()

User state
- .toggleFavorite(alias)
- .filterFavorites()
- .addToHistory(alias)
- .getHistory()
- .clearHistory()

items.label: Constructor
items.content: const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({ video, audio, txt, id, rateLimit, autoReconnect })

items.label: Events
items.content:
- ready (peer ID ready)
- open (connection active)
- data (message received)
- stream (media received)
- close (connection closed)
- error (error occurred)
- reconnecting (retrying connection)
